sqlMap.select: SELECT "ORG_ID", "ORG_NAME", "ORG_CODE", "PARENT_ORG_ID", "ORG_TYPE", "DESCRIPTION", "CREATED_TIME", "CREATED_BY", "UPDATED_TIME", "UPDATED_BY", "STATUS", "REMARK" FROM TD_ORGANIZATION WHERE "PARENT_ORG_ID" = ? AND "STATUS" != 'DELETED' ORDER BY "CREATED_TIME" ASC

SELECT "ORG_ID", "ORG_NAME", "ORG_CODE", "PARENT_ORG_ID", "ORG_TYPE", "DESCRIPTION", "CREATED_TIME", "CREATED_BY", "UPDATED_TIME", "UPDATED_BY", "STATUS", "REMARK" FROM TD_ORGANIZATION WHERE "STATUS" != 'DELETED' #if($orgType) AND "ORG_TYPE" = #[orgType] #end ORDER BY "CREATED_TIME" ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TD_ORGANIZATION WHERE "PARENT_ORG_ID" = ? AND "STATUS" != 'DELETED'

SELECT o."ORG_ID", o."ORG_NAME", o."ORG_CODE", o."PARENT_ORG_ID", o."ORG_TYPE", o."DESCRIPTION", o."CREATED_TIME", o."CREATED_BY", o."UPDATED_TIME", o."UPDATED_BY", o."STATUS", o."REMARK" FROM TD_ORGANIZATION o INNER JOIN TD_USER_ORGANIZATION uo ON o."ORG_ID" = uo."ORG_ID" WHERE uo."USER_ID" = ? AND o."STATUS" != 'DELETED' ORDER BY uo."IS_PRIMARY" DESC, o."CREATED_TIME" ASC
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TD_USER_ORGANIZATION SET "IS_PRIMARY" = CASE WHEN "ORG_ID" = ? THEN '1' ELSE '0' END WHERE "USER_ID" = ?
sqlMap.select: SELECT "PERMISSION_ID", "ORG_ID", "RESOURCE_ID", "ACTION", "INHERIT_FROM_PARENT", "CREATED_TIME", "CREATED_BY" FROM TD_ORG_PERMISSION WHERE "ORG_ID" = ? ORDER BY "CREATED_TIME" ASC
